results.title: Gmail API Project
results.description: This project provides a Python script to send emails using the Gmail API, including steps for authentication and email preparation with attachments.

results.title: Gmail API
results.description: A RESTful API for programmatic access to Gmail mailboxes, enabling applications to read, send, manage, and organize email data.

results.title: SimpleGmail
results.description: A simple Python client for the Gmail API, enabling applications to send and retrieve emails with features like attachments, labels, and advanced search.

results.title: Google Workspace Gmail
results.description: Documentation for developers to build, automate, and enhance Gmail solutions using APIs, add-ons, Apps Script, and AI-powered features within Google Workspace.

results.title: Gmail Processor
results.description: Gmail Processor is an open-source Google Apps Script library that automates the processing of Gmail messages and attachments by executing actions like storing files in Google Drive or logging data to spreadsheets, based on powerful matching criteria.

results.title: Gmail AutoAuth MCP Server
results.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Gmail integration in Claude Desktop with auto authentication support, enabling AI assistants to manage Gmail via natural language.

results.title: Gmail Processor
results.description: Gmail Processor is an open-source Google Apps Script library that automates email processing by executing actions based on matching criteria, such as storing attachments or logging data.

results.title: Gmail Reaper
results.description: An AI-powered Gmail automation example using the Composio SDK to automatically label emails based on custom prompts.

results.title: Gmail MCP
results.description: Gmail MCP is a Model Context Protocol server implementation that provides a standardized interface for Gmail API operations including email management, sending, retrieval, label management, and settings configuration.

results.title: Gemini API
results.description: Gemini API is Google's generative AI API that enables developers to build applications with text generation, multimodal understanding, real-time conversations, and specialized capabilities like image and video generation.

results.title: Pepper
results.description: Pepper is a personal AI assistant that proactively works for you, connecting to Gmail to autonomously summarize important emails, surface critical updates, and delegate complex tasks to a swarm of workers.

results.title: Google API PHP Client
results.description: The Google API Client Library for PHP enables developers to interact with Google APIs such as Gmail, Drive, and YouTube directly from their PHP applications.

results.title: Gemini API
results.description: The Gemini API provides access to Google's advanced AI models for text, image, speech, and video generation and understanding, enabling developers to build innovative applications.

results.title: GenAI Mail Insights
results.description: Develop a CAP-based application using GenAI and RAG on SAP BTP to enhance customer support with email insights, categorization, sentiment analysis, and automated response generation.

results.title: gog
results.description: A minimal command-line interface (CLI) in Go for interacting with various Google services such as Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, and Tasks.

results.title: Google Gmail1
results.description: A complete library to interact with Gmail (protocol v1) using Rust.

results.title: Google Forms API
results.description: Google Forms API is a RESTful interface that lets you create and modify forms and quizzes, retrieve responses and grades, set up quiz answer keys with automatic feedback, and receive push notifications.

results.title: Gemini API Quickstart
results.description: A Python Flask app demonstrating the Google AI Gemini API, featuring multi-modal capabilities, a basic UI, and a Flask backend for quick integration.

results.title: Generative Language API
results.description: The Generative Language API (Gemini API) enables developers to build generative AI applications using multimodal Gemini models, supporting use cases like text and image reasoning, content generation, and dialogue agents.

results.title: ghapi
results.description: ghapi provides a complete and up-to-date Python interface to GitHub's API, automatically converting the OpenAPI spec for seamless integration and automation of GitHub tasks.

results.title: Google APIs
results.description: Google APIs is a collection of tools, client libraries, and documentation for accessing Google's networked APIs across multiple programming languages using gRPC and REST protocols.

results.title: Gemini Live API Web Console
results.description: A React-based starter app for the Live API, featuring audio streaming, media recording, and a unified log view for application development.

results.title: Google Keep API
results.description: Google Keep API enables developers to create, manage, and modify Google Keep notes and content in enterprise environments, including resolving security issues identified by cloud security software.

results.title: People API
results.description: The People API allows reading and managing authenticated user contacts, 'Other contacts,' and profile information, including public Google profile data and Google Workspace domain profiles, while also enabling contact creation, updates, and deletions.

results.title: Google APIs Client Library for .NET
results.description: Enables access to Google APIs like Drive, YouTube, and Calendar with OAuth2.0 authentication, generating strongly-typed libraries from Google's Discovery API.

results.title: GREEN-API
results.description: GREEN-API provides a comprehensive WhatsApp API, enabling developers to integrate WhatsApp functionalities into their applications for sending/receiving messages, managing chats, groups, and automating interactions.

results.title: Gemini API
results.description: A reverse-engineered asynchronous Python wrapper for Google Gemini web app, featuring persistent cookies, image generation, system prompt customization, and extension support.

results.title: GoogleApis (Elixir)
results.description: This project provides tools and generated client libraries for interacting with various Google APIs from Elixir applications, including authentication and making API calls.

results.title: Google Calendar API
results.description: The Google Calendar API is a RESTful API that allows developers to access and manage most features available in the Google Calendar web interface, including events, calendars, and user settings.

results.title: Marketing API
results.description: The Marketing API is a collection of Graph API endpoints and features designed to help users advertise across Meta technologies, including Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, and WhatsApp.
